svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="基建与影响力核心关系" id="infra-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-184" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2;" value="前端团队发展
（核心驱动力）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="400" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_B" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端基建（内功）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="430" x="40" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="前端基建
核心支撑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="160" x="180" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="解决问题
效率低 · 质量差 · 协作难" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="70" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心目标
标准化 · 自动化 · 可复用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="270" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_C" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="技术影响力（外功）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="430" x="510" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="技术影响力
价值延伸" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="160" x="620" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="解决问题
影响力弱 · 人才流失 · 话语权低" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="540" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="核心目标
沉淀技术 · 辐射价值 · 凝聚人才" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="740" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="HUB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="二者相互促进
形成正向循环" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="180" x="400" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAB" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="核心支撑"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAC" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="价值延伸"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBB1" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B1" value="解决问题"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eBB2" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B2" value="核心目标"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eCC1" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C1" value="解决问题"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eCC2" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C2" value="核心目标"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eHUB1" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="相互促进"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="490" y="214" /> <mxPoint x="490" y="214" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
